title: Interruption matrix tests with semantic resume assertions
summary: Implement interruption matrix tests and validate semantic resume intent handling with coverage gate >= 90%.
outputs: Interruption matrix test cases covering all cut points
Deterministic resume assertions for next_action and semantic intent
Coverage gate configuration or verification updates
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover all six interruption cut points defined in the plan.
Each cut point asserts deterministic next_action outcomes.
Semantic resume intent (e.g., "continue") is interpreted deterministically from persisted semantic memory.
Torn-state recovery paths are exercised in tests.
Coverage gate >= 90% is enforced by verification.

steps.description: Create fixtures for each interruption cut point with semantic memory state.
Assert deterministic next_action and semantic intent handling for each case.

notes: Focus on canonical event log + materialized state rebuild with semantic memory.
Avoid legacy artifact assumptions in new tests.
